title: Accident in the Outeniqua Pass
description: GEORGE NEWS - Three people sustained minor...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Three people sustained minor injuries during a car accident in the Outeniqua Pass earlier this afternoon, Friday 1 March.

The accident happened around one of the bends when a silver Mercedes Benz collided with a white Toyota bakkie. The Mercedes ended up partially on top of the barrier wall next to the road.

The road is open for traffic.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
